calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee, Waiver Of Bond, Determination Of Sole Beneficiary And Distribution Of Trust Asset To Beneficiary
Off Calendar Feb-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-22-305360 Irrevocable Housing Trust for ANDREW JR HEWITSON; PTR-22-305361 ANDREW JR HEWITSON Irrevocable Education Trust ; PTR-22-305362 Irrevocable Education Trust for Children of DOUGLAS HEWITSON

Appearances: Aubrey Lerner appeared by zoom for petitioner/trustee.

The court raised concern about how it can establish a trust when there are no documents other than the Schwab statements, questions how one would know what the terms of the trust are and asked if there is any other evidence. Mrs. Lerner stated that all they have are the Schwab statements. Discussion was held regarding the petitioner and Schwab having done a search for any trust documents, no one having been able to find anything, the difficulty in administering a trust when they don't have the terms, the petitioner being the only presumptive beneficiary of these accounts, there also being an account for Michael, Michael having consented to the appointment of Andrew, the matter for Michael having been dismissed because they were able to verify that the petitioner's Aunt was the trustee, Andrew's next step being to provide the order to Schwab in order to take control of the accounts and distribute to himself, etc. The court stated that it is a bit uncomfortable doing that and that it needs some waivers from any other potential heirs/beneficiaries. Mrs. Lerner stated that she believes the only heir is Michael, and that he consents. The court noted that it sees a waiver from Michael and that Michael has consented to the appointment of Andrew as successor trustee, and that he waives bond. The Petitions for Appointment of Successor Trustee, etc. (3) are under submission with the court's intent to grant the petitions.
Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Notice To Successor Trustee

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee, Waiver Of Bond, Determination Of Sole Beneficiary And Distribution Of Trust Asset To Beneficiary
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Continued To Feb-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee, Waiver Of Bond, Determination Of Sole Beneficiary And Distribution Of Trust Asset To Beneficiary
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Continued To Feb-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aubrey Lerner, via Zoom, for Andrew Hewitson, Petitioner.

At the query of the court, counsel reports on the dismissal of the fourth related petition in this matter. The court and counsel discuss service to Petitioner's and his brother's aunt with the court instructing counsel that notice of the remaining subject matters is to be provided to the aunt who may have been designated as successor trustee of the subject trusts.

The matter is continued to Feb-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Status of Notice to Successor Trustee is added for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
